steps.title: Read the vertex directly
steps.content: Written as $p(x)=(x-0)^2+(-57)$, this is vertex form $(h,k)=(0,-57)$. Since $a=1>0$, the parabola opens upward — the vertex is the minimum.

steps.title: State the minimum value
steps.content: The minimum value is $p(0)=-57$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
